title: Pass 5.A.4 follow-up: implement ucc backend FFI bindings
description:
Replaces closed #459 (Add additional distributed backends: Gloo, MPI, UCC). The ucc_backend.rs module is currently a fail-fast skeleton (every Backend method returns Err(BackendUnavailable { backend: "ucc" })). Real implementation requires:

- UCC (Unified Collective Communication) C library at compile time
- Rust FFI bindings (no published crate yet — needs custom bindgen)
- CI host with InfiniBand / NVLink + CUDA (UCC is HPC-cluster oriented)

UCC has the smallest install footprint outside HPC environments of the four backends. Gated behind `ucc-backend` feature (default off).
